<!-- Chart CH-SPA-05 FLOW MAP, role-based (themeable) -->

## FLOW MAP chart (CH-SPA-05)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-SPA-05",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "flow",
    "magnitude"
  ],
  "form": "curved width-scaled arrows between supplied places",
  "data_required": "base polygons + places + flows [{from, to, value}], <= 8 flows",
  "family": "SPA",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-FLO-02 (flows without geography)",
    "CH-FLO-04 (dense mutual exchange)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "geography adds nothing",
      "use": "CH-FLO-02"
    },
    {
      "when": "everything flows to everything",
      "use": "CH-FLO-02"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- origin-destination stories over real geography
- corridor volumes: what moves where, how much

Do NOT use when:
- more than ~8 flows (spaghetti)
- flows both directions between the same pair (split or net them first)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "flow unit",
  "note": "coordinates are author-supplied unit-square (0-100) geometry; the renderer scales, the author owns projection and aspect",
  "regions": "base polygons",
  "places": "[{name, at}]",
  "flows": "[{from: [x,y], to: [x,y], value}]"
}
```

### Exact layout (px on the canvas, follow literally)
```json
{
  "canvas": {
    "width": 960,
    "height": 540
  },
  "layout": {
    "title": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 56,
      "y_with_eyebrow": 88,
      "size": 24
    },
    "kicker": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 28,
      "w": 24,
      "h": 4
    },
    "eyebrow": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 52,
      "size": 11,
      "letter_spacing": 2
    },
    "source": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 516,
      "size": 11
    },
    "plot": {
      "left": 120,
      "right": 840,
      "top": 110,
      "bottom": 470
    },
    "flow_max": 10,
    "label": {
      "size": 11
    }
  }
}
```

### Rules
- arrow width proportional to value; the largest flow is labeled
- arrowheads mark direction; curves bend one deterministic way

### Never do this
- two-way arrows on one curve
- more than 8 flows
- width not proportional to value

### QA before delivering
- [ ] width-true arrows
- [ ] largest flow labeled
- [ ] <= 8 flows
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| flow | primary |
| place | ink |
| label | body |
| title | ink |
| source | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
